title: The Fear of God in the Early Church
reading:
The early church walked in both the comfort of the Holy Spirit and the fear of the Lord. These were not opposites. A healthy church possesses both intimacy and reverence.

The account of Ananias and Sapphira reminds believers that God's holiness did not disappear after the resurrection. Grace does not eliminate reverence. Grace deepens it.
reflection:
Do you balance intimacy with reverence?

How can churches cultivate holy awe?

What does God's holiness teach about discipleship?
abide: Lord, let my life reflect both Your grace and Your holiness.
